title: Minimum Essential Standards, Assessment and Rating for Postgraduate Institutions and Minimum Standards for Postgraduate Education in Ayurveda Regulations, 2024
notes: PG (MD/MS) Ayurveda 2024. PG is a per-programme, ratio-driven model (guide:student 1:3/1:2/1:1, IPD beds 4:1 per seat, <=12 seats/programme). Only the flat/threshold-shaped standards are encoded here (land, central + digital library area, seminar hall, student-support cell, IPD beds at 4:1 via byIntake, 80% departmental bed occupancy, AEBAS/website, digital computers 1:5). Guide:student ratios and per-department cadres are report-driven (staff-table/roster) — the requirement comes from the extracted report, not the ruleset. supportedIntakes are representative per-programme PG seat counts. Punitive policy is the ASU-wide board policy (2026-27).
